summary: Plan-only classification for five open PR inventory items. No merge action is recommended because the artifact lacks required Codex /review proof and mergeability is unknown for every PR. Four PRs are independently scoped and should continue through normal maintainer preflight; #79049 needs maintainer attention because it is broad and has failing checks.

Independent UI PR; comments and Codex review must be checked before any merge recommendation.
Independent small agents PR; continue normal maintainer preflight.
